summary: Session 2 of 3: shipped the extension code that makes every repo-creation path emit uniform, tier-aware scaffolding from the Session-1 template bundle. (1) New shared template writer src/utils/consumerBootstrap.ts renders the six consumer artifacts (CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI.md = shared body + per-engine tail, docs/dabbler/start-here.md, and the active set's spec.md + schemaVersion-4 session-state.json) with token substitution, N-session expansion (one ### Session K of N block + session-00K/ keys; one not-started sessions[] object per session), CRLF normalization, and a totalSessions>=1 guard. esbuild copies the canonical docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap bundle into dist/templates (verified packaged via vsce ls; explicit !dist/templates/** in .vscodeignore). (2) gitScaffold (dabbler.setupNewProject) prompts tier + set details, renders the artifacts (skip-existing), and runs a tier-aware install: both tiers get .venv + pip install dabbler-ai-router, only Full keeps router-config.yaml (Lightweight removes the seeded copy = the sole D3 divergence). (3) sessionGenPrompt now shows fully writer-rendered, ~~~~-fenced exemplars (schemaVersion 4, NNN- slug, tier, verificationMode) instead of raw {{TOKEN}} templates; never the retired schemaVersion-2/bare-slug shape. (4) Get Started wizard gained the explicit 'start the next session' cold-start closure (D7). 636 TS tests pass (2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures unrelated). No release this session (Marketplace bump is Session 3).
verification_notes: gpt-5-4 cross-provider, 3 rounds, all findings resolved in-flight. R1 (2 Major, 1 Minor) and R2 (1 Major incl. the CRLF expansion bug, 2 Minor) fully fixed with regression tests. R3 returned ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major, 3 Minor) at the retry budget: the lone Major ('the VSIX may exclude dist/templates, breaking scaffold at runtime') was EMPIRICALLY DISPROVEN by running `vsce ls`, which lists all 8 bundle files as packaged; an explicit !dist/templates/** line was added to .vscodeignore for durability. The 3 R3 Minors were fixed (esbuild re-copies the bundle on every rebuild so --watch can't go stale; renderSpec/renderSessionState throw on a non-positive totalSessions; sessionGenPrompt tests now negatively assert no bare-slug examples). Converged here rather than spend a 4th paid round, per the workflow's max-2-retries guidance; raw verdicts preserved in s2-verification.md / -round-2.md / -round-3.md.

reason.specifics: Session 3 (final) authors the cold-start acceptance fixtures for both tiers, the CI drift guards (stale-framing guard + template snapshot that the rendered output matches docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap + one-active-set check), the operator UAT checklist, and the held Marketplace bump. Same orchestrator carries the writer/render contract, the dist/templates packaging proof, and the open follow-ups (the R3-suggested post-build VSIX smoke test is naturally S3's snapshot/CI scope).
